title: Retextures o' Plenty
body:
#

A Resource pack for Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.21.1 & 1.21.10

#

Retextures o' Plenty is a resource pack for the Biomes o Plenty mod, which aims to enhance some of the mod's textures!
Currently, the pack retextures around 300+ of the mods textures, including adding variants for certain blocks to enhance certain biomes
Later on, there are plans to integrate compatibility for BOP's addon mods, but for the time being its just the base mod.
